request_summary: Investigate the TemperAI release process and document it in Docs/Release.md.

context.stack: Prompt/skill-driven TemperAI agent workflow; .NET 10 CLI released via GitHub Actions on v* tags
context.notes: Release = commit on main + git tag vX.Y.Z pushed to origin, triggers community-release.yml. Version driven solely by the tag. Docs/Release.md created and approved. NOTE: a prior change-direction workflow (temper-backend direct-action mode) is still pending output approval and was intentionally preserved, untouched.

approved_plan.description: Investigate the release workflow/scripts and write Docs/Release.md documenting how to cut version 1.0.0.
approved_plan.output: Created Docs/Release.md (Spanish). Documents: release = commit on main + tag v1.0.0; build/test then publish job; version comes only from the git tag (csproj 0.1.0 is overridden); published assets and troubleshooting. Output approved by user.

next_action: Release documentation task complete and approved. No specialist queued. A prior temper-backend direct-action change can be resumed if the user requests it.
